name: experiment_core
description: Universal controlled experiment protocol — hypothesis, fixture, rubric, baseline, iterate.

steps.name: State hypothesis
steps.validation: contains HYPOTHESIS:, CURRENT BEHAVIOUR:, SUCCESS CRITERION:

steps.name: Build fixture
steps.validation: no embedded criteria or model answers
checklist: Contains only raw input the subject would receive in production
Contains no criteria, hints, or expected outcomes
File is frozen — will not be edited after baseline

steps.name: Write rubric
steps.validation: min 1 binary criterion, written before baseline
checklist: Each criterion is observable and binary (pass/fail)
Rubric file is separate from fixture

steps.name: Run baseline
checklist: Agent received only task prompt + fixture (not rubric)

steps.name: Iterate
steps.validation: one change per iter, regressions recorded, all criteria pass in final iter
checklist: Exactly one thing changed between runs
Predicted effect written before applying change
All criteria pass in this iteration

anti_patterns: Writing rubric criteria after seeing output
Changing the task prompt between runs
Eyeballing output instead of scoring rubric criteria
Including model answers in the fixture
